stories.title: Your first briefing will appear here
stories.excerpt: Run the GitHub Action once (Actions tab → Briefings → Run workflow) to generate the first real briefing. After that it refreshes automatically on the schedule in .github/workflows/brief.yml.
bullets: Setup complete — pipeline is wired up.
Run the Action once to populate real stories.
It then refreshes on its own schedule.
stories.summary: This is placeholder content so the dashboard renders before the first run. Open the Actions tab, choose Briefings, and click Run workflow. The fetcher pulls real-estate feeds, asks Claude to summarize each story, and commits a fresh data.json that replaces this message.
stories.impact: Once live, each story shows a "Why it matters" line connecting the news to apartment demand, supply, capital, or cost — e.g., a major employer relocating to a metro and what it means for rental demand there.
